status: DRAFT — awaiting the SEPARATE execution countersignature (adjudication §10). No Stage-3 instance has been run.
classification: numerical-implementation package. Binds the IMPLEMENTED successor Stage-3 cascade to the countersigned DESIGN. It does not alter the registered MR-002 research design, feasible set, objectives, signal, risk limits, gates, or data windows.
purpose: Bind the finalized implementation of the countersigned `QUADPROG_SQRT -> PIQP_P2 (once)` cascade — its source, its complete §7 eligibility fixtures, the container image, the runtime configuration, the regenerated-population protocol, the quarantine non-reuse checks, and the stop behavior — into one artifact submitted for the execution countersignature that adjudication §10 requires before any Stage-3 instance may be resolved.

reproduced.fallback_trigger: only a registered NUMERICAL_STATUS_NONQUALIFICATION or CERTIFICATE_NONQUALIFICATION

design_countersignature_does_not_authori: reuse of any quarantined artifact/row disposition

1_implemented_cascade_source_and_tree_id.note: The finalized cascade is a NEW module that adds ONLY the §7 decision table over the frozen numerical paths. It introduces no new numerical method: the primary/fallback/certifier are the frozen implementations, imported (not re-derived).

prepared_at_head.note: The files below are working-tree artifacts prepared at this HEAD; the implementation commit + tree that contains their final bytes is supplied to, and bound by, the execution countersignature (external binding, per the design's Correction-1 Option-A pattern — a file cannot contain the hash of the commit that contains it).

source_files.role: finalized cascade (production module + §7 decision table + injection seam)
complete §7 eligibility fixtures (decision table; stub-driven; laptop-runnable)
in-image realism harness (binds the REAL primary/fallback/certifier on tiny hand-solvable problems)

frozen_numerical_paths_bound.fallback_PIQP_P2: scripts.mr002_coverage_signed_gap.SOLVERS['PIQP_P2'] (mr002_piqp.solve_piqp(True, ...); BASE settings; fresh solver per instance; no warm start)
frozen_numerical_paths_bound.certifier: scripts.mr002_coverage_signed_gap.canonical_qualify (registered KKT LIMITS + two-sided signed Lagrangian gap; CertificateDefect re-raised as an integrity defect)

2_eligibility_fixtures.requirement: adjudication §7 'Required test fixtures (every branch exercised)'; every §7 category reached; a PRIMARY integrity defect proven never to invoke the fallback.
2_eligibility_fixtures.design_of_fixtures: The decision table is validated in isolation from the numerical stack: fixtures inject stub solvers / a stub certifier and assert routing + the fallback-invocation invariant. This makes each branch deterministic and reproducible without quadprog/piqp/mpmath. The numerical PRODUCIBILITY of each enum against the real solvers on tiny hand-solvable problems is exercised by the in-image realism harness (run under the clean rerun).

nine_required_branches.branch: valid solver exception eligible for rescue
finite candidate failing one KKT gate
finite candidate failing only the signed-gap gate
unknown status -> INTEGRITY_DEFECT (exact class AND message; no substring/analogy)
PRIMARY integrity failure — PROOF the fallback was not called
nine_required_branches.disposition: INVALID_RUN; fallback_invoked=False AND the fallback callable is never constructed (Spy.calls==0)

additional_invariants_tested: PRIMARY_QUALIFIED does not invoke the fallback
a §7-C model-input defect (t_i <= 0) STOPs before either solver is constructed
every outcome is one of the four terminal dispositions and every enum is in the closed set
only the two QUALIFIED dispositions accept a point; STOP dispositions accept none

run_evidence.environment: backend .venv (numpy 2.2.6; no quadprog/piqp/mpmath needed — decision table is stub-driven)
run_evidence.note: These are laptop-runnable and were run in this session. The in-image realism harness was NOT run here (piqp/mpmath absent locally; real-solver realism is deferred to the clean rerun in the pinned image).

3_container_image.note: This is the known-good frozen research image that produced the immutable characterization corpus (1d231930...). The clean successor rerun (§10) records a FRESH container/runtime binding and re-verifies the image identity anew; it is not imported from any quarantined run. The execution countersignature pins the exact image digest used for execution.

4_runtime_configuration.cpu_requirement: AVX2-only CPU (AWS c6a / m6a / r6a — AMD Zen 3, no AVX-512). ⚠ NEVER an AVX-512 instance: AVX-512 lives inside the QP solvers and changes the corpus/qualification manifest even with env knobs set.
4_runtime_configuration.why_env: Single-threaded BLAS + the AVX2 (Haswell) OpenBLAS kernel reproduce the laptop numerical profile bit-for-bit (IEEE-754 AVX2/FMA3 is identical across Intel/AMD). This is the equivalence proof, not a tuning choice.
4_runtime_configuration.certifier_precision: >= 100 decimal digits (mpmath iv.dps=100); exact as_integer_ratio inputs; outward rounding; NO max(Gamma,0), NO cushion, NO KKT-to-objective conversion
4_runtime_configuration.primary_construction: QUADPROG_SQRT: z = diag(sqrt(t)) v; H_v = 2I exactly; lam recovered and unscaled back to original coordinates.

5_regenerated_population_protocol.requirement: adjudication §10 clean successor-rerun protocol; performed ONLY after the execution countersignature.
steps: fresh checkout at the countersigned implementation commit + a fresh source manifest; fresh container/runtime binding recorded
NO checkpoint, record, certificate, aggregate, or artifact reused from the quarantine; no quarantined row disposition copied into the successor evidence path
the complete corpus and all overlap/coverage manifests regenerated anew and re-verified against the registered corpus hash 1d2319301a7b52dfe369819bc8029f7b6d64ad820d828f041eba15a91348390b

the population is resolved by the finalized §7 cascade (primary; fallback only on an eligible numerical nonqualification; exactly once), NOT by an intersection over both solvers on every row (the quarantined population-constitution defect is not reproduced)
validation and sealed-OOS windows remain inaccessible (sealed and unread)
deterministic checkpoint/resume permitted ONLY within the new run
5_regenerated_population_protocol.future_unresolved_set: unknown until executed; NOT asserted zero; UNRESOLVED_NUMERICAL_FAILURE -> STOP remains a live successor-run outcome (adjudication §5.6).

mechanical_checks_embedded_in_this_packa: the finalized cascade module imports NONE of: scripts.mr002_full_population, app.research.mr002.dataset.FrozenDataset, app.research.mr002.runner.CONFIGS, the corpus, or the frozen duckdb — verified by source scan (only the frozen primary/fallback/certifier are imported)

no quarantined content-hash, row index (2307), population count (3839), corpus hash, checkpoint, or AMENDED-PASS token appears anywhere in the finalized source, fixtures, or realism harness — verified by grep (CLEAN)
the fixtures and realism harness operate ONLY on tiny hand-built problems; they never open the registered corpus, the frozen dataset, or a population-selection loop
6_quarantine_non_reuse_checks.reuse: PROHIBITED for primary/fallback/eligibility/certificate/population/threshold. The clean successor rerun regenerates all evidence anew.

7_stop_behavior.requirement: adjudication §7 (§7-C INVALID_RUN, §7-D fallback dispositions) and §11 stop gates.

terminal_dispositions.PRIMARY_QUALIFIED: accept primary; fallback NOT invoked; continue
terminal_dispositions.FALLBACK_QUALIFIED: eligible primary nonqualification, fallback qualifies; accept fallback; continue
terminal_dispositions.UNRESOLVED_NUMERICAL_FAILURE: eligible primary nonqualification, fallback completes but does not qualify; STOP
terminal_dispositions.INVALID_RUN: any integrity defect in model inputs / primary / fallback; STOP; on a PRIMARY integrity defect the fallback is never invoked

7_stop_behavior.matching_discipline: the numerical allowlist is keyed on EXACT exception class AND EXACT complete message; the sole registered entry is (ValueError, 'constraints are inconsistent, no solution') -> QUADPROG_CONSTRAINTS_INCONSISTENT. No substring/regex/partial match; any deviation is INTEGRITY_DEFECT.
7_stop_behavior.population_level_stops (clean rerun): corpus-hash mismatch, source mismatch, any INVALID_RUN, any UNRESOLVED_NUMERICAL_FAILURE, an unexpected Phase-I-positive result, or any outcome outside the total decision table -> STOP and preserve the partial evidence (adjudication §11).

execution_countersignature_must_bind: the finalized implementation commit + tree containing the source bytes above
the complete eligibility fixtures and their passing run
the source manifest of the implemented cascade
the container image digest used for execution
the runtime configuration (AVX2-only CPU + OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=HASWELL + single-threaded BLAS + registered LIMITS/PIQP BASE)
scope_boundary: This package authorizes NOTHING to execute. It is submitted so the owner can grant (or withhold) the separate execution countersignature that adjudication §10 requires. Until then: no Stage-3 instance is run; MR002_Implementation_Erratum_v1.0 remains SUSPENDED; the quarantined AMENDED PASS remains non-reusable; preflight CLOSED; performance NOT COMPUTED; validation and sealed OOS SEALED AND UNREAD.
